case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. SUHEER S BLUNDELL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT BLUNDELL, SUHEER S NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-24-2021

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-11-2022 - CASE SETTLED PER COUNSEL AT TRIAL CALL. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON SEP-13-2022 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385.
